actions.action: Click 'Home' button to go to launcher screen
Navigate to 'Wireless and networks' (or 'Network and internet' on newer APIs)
Tap 'SIMs' (which may show a carrier name like T-Mobile beneath it). Verify that the SIM settings screen opens successfully.
Locate the 'Mobile data' toggle switch. Tap the toggle to switch it to the OFF position. Verify that the toggle is now in the OFF state.
Return to Chrome app and wait for app to load successfully
Tap the Third shortcut icon located just below the search bar.
Verify that the webpage now loads successfully
Click 'Home' button to go to launcher screen
